capture_note: Captured before any S6 file was created. S1-S5 are landed/committed-in-tree already, so this is a clean pre-story baseline for the unit suite. e2e is this story's own deliverable, so there is no pre-story e2e baseline to capture beyond confirming the definitive gate (make test-e2e-all) is the target this story's specs must eventually pass under.

pre_existing_failures.reason: Icon-set naming mismatch (lucide: vs ph:/pixelarticons: iconify ids) from an unrelated theme refactor — zero overlap with this epic's files. Identical debt already recorded as pre-existing across every S1-S5 baseline.json in this epic (e.g. S5-pairing-ui-i18n/baseline.json).
pre_existing_failures.decision: Recorded, not blocking, per this epic's established precedent.

lint_detail: next lint has no committed ESLint config in app/ (no .eslintrc*/eslint.config*); `npx next lint` prompts interactively for first-time setup with no way to run non-interactively. No usable lint gate exists for this project (matches every prior story's baseline in this epic).
typecheck_detail: npx tsc --noEmit exits 0 with zero diagnostics.

e2e_baseline.note: Docker and docker compose are present in this environment (docker compose config validates docker-compose.e2e.yml). Whether the full make test-e2e-all run (12 non-relay + this story's new relay-bucket specs) can actually complete inside this sandbox's time/network constraints is verified at Regression Prevention time, not assumed here.
